name: BreadcrumbBar - Windows apps - Microsoft Learn
snippet: The BreadcrumbBar control provides the direct path of pages or folders to the current location. It adapts to a variety of screen sizes.

name: Can breadcrumbs replace back arrows in UX design?
snippet: In this article, I'll break down the role of breadcrumbs in UX, compare them with simple back arrow-based navigation, and explore how to create ...

name: What is Breadcrumb & How It Eases Navigation? (With Examples)
snippet: A breadcrumb is a secondary navigation aid that improves customer experience by helping users understand their location on a website or mobile application.

name: Windows UI 3: Navigation - Breadcrumb Bar | Controls in WinUI 3
snippet: ... app demonstrates all of the Windows UI 3 library controls and styles available to make a WinUI 3 app with the Windows App SDK. To learn more ...

name: Breadcrumbs: 11 Design Guidelines for Desktop and Mobile - NN/G
snippet: Guidelines for Using Breadcrumbs on Desktop. Breadcrumbs should not replace the global navigation bar or the local navigation within a section.
